chunks.summary: A dramatic monologue by a revolutionary figure warning of control and violence, followed by an identification of the speaker as Raul Menendez.
Raul Menendez continues his speech about bringing peace, while Speaker 2 (David) expresses frustration and concern about the situation, emphasizing the need for answers.
Menendez taunts David about his actions, claiming it is only the beginning of his suffering. David ignores the taunt and attempts to contact Specter One for a situation report.
David confronts Menendez, insisting the situation is not real, to which Menendez aggressively retorts.
David shouts at Menendez to pull himself together amidst the ongoing standoff.
Menendez taunts David about the difficulty of killing an idea versus a man. David retorts that Menendez was never meant to be a Mason and declares that their conflict ends now.
This chunk contains a promotional advertisement for a 'Reznov challenge pack' for a video game, interrupting the previous scene.
No speech detected in this 0.04s interval; promotional advertisement continues.

mechanicalTranscript:
--- CHUNK 0 [0.00s - 20.00s] ---
[0.00-5.00] Speaker 1: They want you afraid. Fear makes you easier to control.
[8.50-10.50] Speaker 1: It's time to wake up.
[12.00-17.50] Speaker 1: Your streets shall once again run red with your blood.
[17.50-20.00] Speaker 2: Raul Menendez, United Global Unrest.

--- CHUNK 1 [20.00s - 40.00s] ---
[20.00-22.20] Raul Menendez: on an unprecedented scale.
[23.20-24.50] Speaker 2: Menendez is a terrorist.
[24.50-27.20] Raul Menendez: We're bringing peace and security to the world.
[28.00-30.00] Speaker 2: He refuses to let me go.
[30.20-33.00] Raul Menendez: Stop looking backwards, David. What matters is what we do next.
[35.20-37.00] Speaker 2: A lot of people counting on us for answers.

--- CHUNK 2 [40.00s - 60.00s] ---
[40.00-42.50] Raul Menendez: You have no idea what you've done.
[43.00-46.00] David: I know exactly what I've done, Menendez.
[46.50-50.00] Raul Menendez: This is just the beginning of your suffering.
[50.50-53.00] David: Specter One, report!
[53.50-55.00] David: Need a sitrep!

--- CHUNK 3 [60.00s - 80.00s] ---
[62.00-63.00] David: This isn't real.
[63.30-64.20] Raul Menendez: The hell it ain't!

--- CHUNK 4 [80.00s - 100.00s] ---
[98.00-99.50] David: Pull it together, man!

--- CHUNK 5 [100.00s - 120.00s] ---
[100.00-102.50] Menendez: So eager to leave, David.
[103.00-106.00] Menendez: Killing the man is a hell of a lot easier than killing the idea.
[108.50-110.50] David: You were never cut out to be a Mason.
[113.00-115.00] David: No more games. This ends now.

--- CHUNK 6 [120.00s - 140.00s] ---
[122.00-125.00] Announcer: Get the Reznov challenge pack when you pre-order now.

--- CHUNK 7 [140.00s - 140.04s] ---
